_note: Two seed queries pulled to validate the 'Calorie Cart' product name and the broader concept-search demand. Both returned ZERO results — a meaningful finding: the name is available (no incumbent owns it as a search term) AND the product-concept search demand is essentially nonexistent (classic latent-demand pattern, same shape as Honey before cashback was a category). Distribution must come via adjacent meal-planner long-tails, not via direct concept searches.

calorie cart.interpretation: Not a searched term. Confirms name is available + concept is latent.

grocery calorie tracker.interpretation: Not a searched term. Confirms the in-cart calorie-tracking concept has zero direct search demand. Same shape as Honey/Rakuten pre-cashback — must build the wedge via adjacent keywords.

_recommendation: Don't try to rank for 'calorie cart' — own the name as a brand, drive traffic via the meal-planner long-tails (KD 4-6) documented in calorie-cart_meal-planner_2026-05-21.json
